home.subtitle: Since 1969, high-quality PET bottles, plastic bottles, spray packaging, pumps, and caps for the cosmetics sector. Custom design and wholesale solutions at your service.
home.heroHeading: Shaping the Future of Packaging for 57 Years
home.heroSubtext: Turkey's trusted B2B partner for PET bottles, plastic packaging and cap solutions for the cosmetics industry.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Discover our high-quality cosmetic packaging solutions for every sector. From standard products to custom design.
home.whyUsSubtitle: The values and advantages behind our position among the industry's leading companies.
home.aboutLead1: Since 1969, Kısmet Plastik has been offering quality and trust in cosmetic packaging production. With our wide product range, we can meet all the needs of the cosmetics sector.
home.aboutLead2: We serve our B2B customers with many cosmetic packaging solutions including PET bottles, plastic bottles, cologne bottles, spray packaging, room fragrance bottles, liquid soap bottles and caps.
home.sectorsSubtitle: We offer standards-compliant cosmetic packaging solutions tailored to different sector needs.
home.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for cosmetic packaging solutions that meet your needs. Our expert team will offer you the best solution.

homeFeatures.modernFactoryDesc: High-capacity production at our facility equipped with state-of-the-art machinery.
homeFeatures.qualityAssuranceDesc: Production to international quality standards with ISO 9001, ISO 22000 and FSSC 22000 certifications.
homeFeatures.ecoFriendlyDesc: Environmentally conscious approach with recyclable materials and sustainable production processes.
homeFeatures.fastDeliveryDesc: On-time delivery of your orders with our fast and secure nationwide logistics network.
homeFeatures.highCapacityDesc: We meet large-scale orders with monthly production capacity in the millions.
homeFeatures.supportDesc: Our expert team is with you at every stage, before and after sales.
homeFeatures.processStep1Desc: We carefully select the highest quality PET, HDPE, and PP raw materials. We work with reliable suppliers that meet international standards.
homeFeatures.processStep2Desc: We perform high-capacity, precision manufacturing with state-of-the-art injection and blow molding machines.
homeFeatures.processStep3Desc: We guarantee quality through comprehensive testing and control processes under ISO 9001, ISO 22000 and FSSC 22000 standards.
homeFeatures.processStep4Desc: We deliver your orders on time with our fast and secure logistics network across Turkey.

homeStrengths: 55+ years of expertise in cosmetic sector since 1969
Mold design and custom production capability
Competitive pricing and flexible payment options

products.title: All Products
products.subtitle: Browse our PET bottles, plastic bottles, cologne bottles, spray packaging, room fragrance bottles, liquid soap bottles and caps. Use filters and search to easily find the product that suits your needs.

about.heroSubtitle: The address of quality and trust with over 55 years of experience in the cosmetic packaging sector.
about.storyTitle: The Name You Trust in Cosmetic Packaging
about.storyP1: Kısmet Plastik was founded in 1969 in the Vefa district of Fatih, İstanbul, focusing on cosmetic packaging production. Today, we are proud to be one of Turkey's leading cosmetic packaging manufacturers.
about.storyP2: With over 55 years of experience, we focus on providing our customers with the highest quality cosmetic packaging products at the most affordable cost, always using the latest technology. We continue to make a difference in the sector with our honest and dynamic work approach, keeping customer satisfaction above all.
about.missionText: To best meet the needs and expectations of cosmetic brands, to offer the highest quality cosmetic packaging products at the most affordable cost using the latest technology, and to embrace continuous development and innovation.
about.visionText: To be Turkey's leading organization in the cosmetic packaging sector, to become an important player in the international market, and to contribute to a sustainable future.
about.valueQualityDesc: Production to international standards with ISO 9001, ISO 22000 and FSSC 22000 certifications.
about.valueSustainabilityDesc: Recyclable materials and environmentally conscious production processes.
about.valueInnovationDesc: State-of-the-art machinery and constantly evolving product portfolio.
about.valueCustomerDesc: Pre and post-sales technical support, custom design and flexible solutions.
about.certsSubtitle: We produce in compliance with international quality and cosmetic safety standards.

contact.heroSubtitle: Contact us for your questions or quote requests. Our expert team will get back to you as soon as possible.

contact.formSuccess: Your message has been received. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

quality.heroSubtitle: We produce to international standards and guarantee quality at every stage.
quality.certsSubtitle: All our production processes are certified in compliance with international standards.
quality.processSubtitle: We apply rigorous quality control processes at every stage from raw materials to shipment.
quality.step1Desc: All raw materials from suppliers undergo laboratory testing.
quality.step2Desc: Quality parameters are continuously monitored and recorded at every production stage.
quality.step3Desc: Finished products undergo pressure, leak, dimensional and visual tests.
quality.step4Desc: Final quality control before packaging, shipped under appropriate conditions.
quality.labDesc: We guarantee the quality and safety of our products through tests conducted in our modern laboratory.

pet-sise-50ml-damla.name: PET Bottle 50ml Drop
pet-sise-50ml-damla.description: 50ml drop model PET bottle. Compact design for serums, skin care oils, and eye contour care products. Compatible with droppers or mini pumps via 18mm neck diameter.

pet-sise-100ml-silindir.name: PET Bottle 100ml Cylinder
pet-sise-100ml-silindir.description: 100ml cylinder model PET bottle. Elegant cylindrical design for cologne, perfume, and personal care products. 20mm neck diameter.

pet-sise-250ml-kristal.name: PET Bottle 250ml Crystal
pet-sise-250ml-kristal.description: 250ml crystal model PET bottle. Stylish crystal pattern for shampoo, shower gel, and personal care products. 24mm Modern neck.

pet-sise-500ml-duz.name: PET Bottle 500ml Plain
pet-sise-500ml-duz.description: 500ml plain model PET bottle. High-volume plain design for shampoo, conditioner, and liquid soap. 28mm neck diameter.

hdpe-sise-200ml-silindir.name: HDPE Bottle 200ml Cylinder
hdpe-sise-200ml-silindir.description: 200ml HDPE cylinder bottle. Durable, opaque structure for lotion, cream, and body milk packaging. 24mm Classic neck.

pp-sise-300ml-oval.name: PP Bottle 300ml Oval
pp-sise-300ml-oval.description: 300ml PP oval bottle. Flexible, squeezable oval form for shampoo and hair care products. 24mm Modern neck.

hdpe-sise-500ml-kare.name: HDPE Bottle 500ml Square
hdpe-sise-500ml-kare.description: 500ml HDPE square bottle. Modern square form for shampoo, shower gel, and liquid soap products. 28mm neck diameter.

kapak-18mm-vidali.name: Cap 18mm Screw
kapak-18mm-vidali.description: 18mm screw cap. Standard screw cap for serums, essential oils, and small cosmetic bottles.

kapak-24mm-flip-top.name: Cap 24mm Flip-Top
kapak-24mm-flip-top.description: 24mm flip-top cap. Practical one-hand opening cap for shampoo, lotion, and cosmetic bottles. Compatible with Classic and Modern necks.

kapak-24mm-disc-top.name: Cap 24mm Disc-Top
kapak-24mm-disc-top.description: 24mm disc-top cap. Push-open disc-top system for shampoo, shower gel, and lotion bottles.

ic-tipa-18mm.name: Inner Plug 18mm
ic-tipa-18mm.description: 18mm inner plug. PE inner plug providing leak-proof seal for serum, essential oil, and cologne bottles. Used under spray and dropper caps.

damlatici-tipa-20mm.name: Dropper Insert 20mm
damlatici-tipa-20mm.description: 20mm dropper insert. Controlled dripping insert for serum, eye drop, and essential oil bottles.

sizdirmazlik-tipasi-24mm.name: Sealing Plug 24mm
sizdirmazlik-tipasi-24mm.description: 24mm sealing plug. Sealing element used under flip-top and disc-top caps for lotion, shampoo, and cosmetic bottles.

parmak-sprey-18mm-ince-sis.name: Finger Spray 18mm Fine Mist
parmak-sprey-18mm-ince-sis.description: 18mm finger spray mechanism, fine mist type. Provides precise atomization for perfume, cologne, and small cosmetic bottles.

parmak-sprey-20mm-standart.name: Finger Spray 20mm Standard
parmak-sprey-20mm-standart.description: 20mm finger spray mechanism. Standard spray head for cologne, body spray, and room fragrance bottles.

parmak-sprey-24mm-parfum.name: Finger Spray 24mm Perfume
parmak-sprey-24mm-parfum.description: 24mm finger spray mechanism, perfume type. Powerful spray capacity for large-volume cologne and cosmetic spray bottles.

losyon-pompasi-28mm.name: Lotion Pump 28mm
losyon-pompasi-28mm.description: 28mm lotion pump. Metered pump mechanism for liquid soap, lotion, and shampoo bottles. Compatible with bottles up to 500ml via long dip tube.

kopuk-pompasi-28mm.name: Foam Pump 28mm
kopuk-pompasi-28mm.description: 28mm foam pump. Air-mixed foam producing pump mechanism for hand wash liquid and facial cleansing foam bottles.

krem-pompasi-24mm.name: Cream Pump 24mm
krem-pompasi-24mm.description: 24mm cream dispensing pump. Pump with powerful suction capacity for thick-viscosity lotion, cream, and hair care products.

tetikli-puskurtucu-28mm-standart.name: Trigger Sprayer 28mm Standard
tetikli-puskurtucu-28mm-standart.description: 28mm standard trigger sprayer. Adjustable nozzle with mist and jet modes for cleaning liquids, glass cleaner, and multi-purpose spray products.

tetikli-puskurtucu-28mm-kopuklu.name: Trigger Sprayer 28mm Foam
tetikli-puskurtucu-28mm-kopuklu.description: 28mm foam trigger sprayer. Foam mode trigger mechanism with powerful spray capacity for bathroom and kitchen cleaners.

plastik-huni-30mm.name: Plastic Funnel 30mm
plastik-huni-30mm.description: 30mm opening plastic funnel. Ideal for filling small-volume cosmetic, perfume, and serum bottles. PP material, reusable.

plastik-huni-50mm.name: Plastic Funnel 50mm
plastik-huni-50mm.description: 50mm opening plastic funnel. Wide-mouth, fast-flow design for filling medium and large volume bottles.
